backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing an MLM platform with user profile management, role-based access control, member registration, matrix tree positioning, and commission calculation logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three Internet Identity session persistence and access-control fix features to their relevant frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the React/TanStack app including session restoration, UI components, and query hooks.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the RAY INFOTECH MLM app that mounts the React root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with all routes, shows a full-screen loading spinner during identity restoration, and conditionally renders the ProfileSetupModal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AddMemberForm.ts: Form component for registering a new MLM member with name, mobile, email, and optional sponsor ID fields, including real-time sponsor validation and a success state displaying the assigned member ID.
frontend/src/components/CommissionHistor: Renders a 9-level MLM commission breakdown table showing members, rates, earned commissions, and max potential commissions per level, with locked/unlocked status indicators.
Displays a summary card of a member's total earned vs. potential earnings across all 9 MLM levels, including joining fee refund eligibility status.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component showing copyright year and a branded link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links for Home, Dashboard, Register Member, and Admin, plus login/logout controls using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wrapper layout component that composes Header, main content area, and Footer into a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/MatrixTreeVisual: Renders a visual 3-ary tree of MLM downline members up to a configurable depth, showing member name, ID, active status, and fee payment status per node.
frontend/src/components/PlatformStatisti: Fetches all members and computes platform-wide stats (total members, fees collected, refunds issued, total commissions) displayed as a grid of summary cards.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to set up their profile (name and contact info) before using the MLM platform, shown only when no existing profile is found.
frontend/src/components/RecruitmentDeadl: A card component that displays a member's recruitment deadline status (Met, Cancelled, or Active with live countdown) and progress toward recruiting 3 direct downlines within 3 days.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing admin access if a token is present and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile, admin status, member listing, registration, commissions, and transactions, each gated on actor and identity readiness.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for the Ray Infotech brand theme (deep navy and gold) in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page that lists all members in a searchable table with actions to mark joining fees paid, delete members, and check membership statuses, plus platform statistics and an add-member form. Access is restricted to admin users verified via the `useIsCallerAdmin` hook.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Member dashboard page displaying a searchable member list, matrix tree visualization, earnings summary, commission history, and recruitment deadline card for a selected member. Handles loading and unauthenticated states.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Public landing/home page showcasing the platform's commission structure (9 levels, 9%–1%) with feature highlights and a hero section, with navigation to login or dashboard based on authentication state.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that triggers Internet Identity authentication and redirects users to `/admin` or `/dashboard` based on their role after login, with loading states during session restoration.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Member registration page with a form collecting name, mobile, email, and sponsor ID, validating inputs and sponsor existence before submitting, then displaying the assigned member ID on success.
frontend/src/utils/deadlineHelpers.ts: Utility functions for working with nanosecond-precision backend timestamps, including formatting, computing deadline status (Active/Met/Cancelled), and calculating time remaining until a deadline.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom brand colors (navy, gold), fonts, shadows, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the RAY INFOTECH MLM app, tracking three fix-request features related to Internet Identity session persistence, access-denied errors, and login redirect logic for already-authenticated users.
